title: viola × scabra
intro: Viola × scabra, also known as Japanese yellow violet, is a hybrid plant species belonging to the viola genus. It is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Asian cultures, for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Viola × scabra include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce pain and inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, Viola × scabra is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used topically in the form of creams and ointments.
